meta.title: JNB Private — The Private Side of Value
meta.description: An independent firm operating as a family office, specialising in ultra-prime advisory and integrated asset management.

hero.headline: The Private Side of Value
hero.description: An independent firm operating as a family office, specialising in ultra-prime advisory and integrated asset management.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.description: JNB Private is an advisory firm operating as an independent family office, dedicated to a select number of clients and carefully chosen mandates.
about.description2: Built on decades of strategic experience, we operate with method, discipline and a long-term perspective. Every transaction is the result of relationships built over time, of a process that combines deep analysis, judgement and strategic vision.
about.description3: We work alongside investors, family offices and selected counterparties in high-value transactions and complex operations, with a direct approach and strictly confidential management.
about.description4: JNB Private is not brokerage in the traditional sense.
about.description5: It is access, structure and control.
about.network: International network across key UHNWI markets

coreFocus.label: Core Focus
coreFocus.title: Real Estate Advisory
coreFocus.subtitle: Real estate advisory lies at our heart.
coreFocus.description: We curate and structure opportunities across residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors, both on and off market.

realEstate.label: What We Do
realEstate.title: Real Estate Brokerage
realEstate.description: Premium residential real estate advisory, curating exceptional living spaces for discerning clients across Italy and beyond.

residential.title: Residential Advisory
residential.description: Curating ultra-prime homes, villas, and apartments, on and off market across key destinations.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle Integration
lifestyle.description: Matching properties to clients' lives, values, and long-term aspirations with precision.

discreet.title: Discreet Transactions
discreet.description: Confidential representation and full lifecycle support, from search to closing and beyond.

aviation.label: What We Do
aviation.title: Aviation Brokerage
aviation.description: We advise on the acquisition, ownership, and stewardship of exceptional private aircrafts, guiding clients through every stage of the aircraft lifecycle.

yacht.label: What We Do
yacht.title: Yacht Brokerage
yacht.description: We provide institutional-grade oversight for high-value yachts and maritime assets, ensuring vessels retain value, perform optimally, and remain exceptional long-term assets.

assetManagement.label: What We Do
assetManagement.title: Integrated Asset Management
assetManagement.description: We provide institutional-grade oversight for complex, high-value portfolios, ensuring that assets perform, appreciate, and endure. Every engagement is founded on clarity, continuity, and accountability.

acquisition.title: Acquisition & Disposition Advisory
acquisition.description: Guiding every acquisition and exit with precision and purpose.

repositioning.title: Repositioning & Yield
repositioning.description: Unlocking value through repositioning and yield optimisation.

legacy.title: Legacy Asset Planning
legacy.description: Preserving and structuring assets across generations.

postAcquisition.title: Post-Acquisition Management
postAcquisition.description: Protecting and optimising your portfolio over the long term.

investment.label: Investment Philosophy
investment.title: From Transaction to Legacy
investment.description: We partner with family offices, independent investors, and funds to identify and structure co-investments in legacy assets, bridging data with the pulse of economic and generational change.

analysis.title: Market & Investment Analysis
analysis.description: Active optimisation of performance and returns.

values.label: Our Values
values.title: Built on discretion, vision, and growth.
values.description: JnB Private operates as a private platform built on discretion, vision, and growth. We engage exclusively by introduction, ensuring that each relationship receives our full strategic attention.

discretion.title: Discretion
discretion.description: Every mandate is handled with absolute confidentiality. Your affairs remain yours.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Foresight that turns opportunity into strategy.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: We preserve and grow what matters most, across generations and markets.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: Our distinction lies in our structure and our philosophy.

leadership.label: Our Leadership Team
leadership.title: Backed by over 20 years of experience and more than €750M in successful transactions.

jennifer.name: Jennifer G. Giraldi
jennifer.description: Visionary leader with a decade at the forefront of Italian luxury real estate. Recognised by Forbes Leader as one of Italy's most influential voices in the industry.

yves.name: Yves J. Besançon
yves.description: Hospitality and ultra-prime real estate specialist. Global perspective, operational depth, and trusted client relationships built across international markets.

cta.label: Request Access
cta.title: Begin the Conversation
cta.description: We engage exclusively by introduction. To explore how JNB Private can serve your interests, complete the form below.
cta.success: Message sent successfully. We will be in touch shortly.
cta.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: JNB Private ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting the privacy and confidentiality of our clients, partners, and website visitors. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Italian legislation.

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content:
The data controller is JNB Private, with registered office at Corso Italia, 2, 50123 Firenze (FI), Italy. C.F/P.Iva 07519920487.

For any enquiry regarding data protection, please contact us at: concierge@jnbprivate.com

dataCollected.title: 2. Data Collected
dataCollected.content:
We may collect the following personal data:

• Contact information (name, email address) when you reach out to us via email
• Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information) collected automatically through essential cookies
• Navigation data (pages visited, time spent) for website functionality purposes

purpose.title: 3. Purpose and Legal Basis
purpose.content:
Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:

• To respond to your enquiries and requests (legal basis: legitimate interest)
• To ensure the proper functioning of our website (legal basis: legitimate interest)
• To comply with legal obligations (legal basis: legal obligation)

We do not use your data for marketing purposes without your explicit consent.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.content:
This website does not use cookies of any kind. We do not use profiling cookies, analytics cookies, third-party tracking cookies, or any other type of cookie.

Language preferences are managed through URL paths and do not require cookies. No data is stored in your browser other than what your browser natively caches.

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Disclosure
thirdParty.content: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to third parties. Your information may be shared only with trusted service providers who assist in operating our website, provided they agree to keep this information confidential and comply with GDPR.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: Personal data collected through email correspondence is retained for the duration necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined above, and in any case no longer than 24 months from the last interaction, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content:
Under GDPR, you have the right to:

• Access your personal data
• Rectify inaccurate data
• Request erasure of your data
• Restrict processing
• Data portability
• Object to processing
• Withdraw consent at any time

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at concierge@jnbprivate.com. We will respond within 30 days.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.content:
For any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact:

JNB Private
Corso Italia, 2, 50123 Firenze (FI), Italy
concierge@jnbprivate.com
